name: No ancestor build exists for the current branch path
query: Chromatic says there is no ancestor build.
context: The branch has not previously produced a usable build in the relevant history path and the customer wants to know whether this is expected.
expected_behavior: Explains that the current run has no usable prior build to compare against
Describes what should happen after a successful baseline-establishing run
success_criteria: The response is honest about the current run
The response does not invent a nonexistent baseline
